parameters.query: SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'architect_email'

SELECT json_build_object('project_id', p.id, 'project_name', p.name, 'property_area_m2', p.property_area_m2, 'location_address', p.location_address, 'location_city', p.location_city, 'location_province', p.location_province, 'client_name', c.name) AS data FROM projects p LEFT JOIN clients c ON c.id = p.client_id WHERE p.id = $1::uuid;
SELECT title_template, body_template FROM certificate_templates WHERE certificate_type = $1 AND is_active = true ORDER BY version DESC LIMIT 1;

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ requests: [{ insertText: { location: { index: 1 }, text: $('Build Content').first().json.body } }] }) }}

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [ $('Build Content').first().json.project_id, $('Build Content').first().json.certificate_type, $('Build Content').first().json.title, $('Build Content').first().json.collegiate_no, $('Build Content').first().json.signer_name, ('https://docs.google.com/document/d/' + ($('Create Google Doc').first().json.id || '') + '/edit'), ($('Create Google Doc').first().json.id || '') ] }}

parameters.subject: =Certificado generado: {{ $('Build Content').first().json.title }}
parameters.message:
=

Certificado generado en borrador

Tipo: {{ $('Build Content').first().json.certificate_type }}

Proyecto: {{ $('Build Content').first().json.project_name }}

Firmante: {{ $('Build Content').first().json.signer_name }} (col. {{ $('Build Content').first().json.collegiate_no }})

Abrir borrador en Google Docs

Revisar, completar campos vacios, imprimir, firmar y registrar (si aplica). Marcar como signed con UPDATE certificates SET status='signed', issued_at=now() WHERE id='{{ $json.id }}';

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({status:'created', certificate_id: $('Insert Certificate Row').first().json.id, title: $('Insert Certificate Row').first().json.title, certificate_type: $('Build Content').first().json.certificate_type, doc_url: ('https://docs.google.com/document/d/' + $('Create Google Doc').first().json.id + '/edit')}) }}
